title: Aster Graf
description: Enter connected membranes, inspect claims beside their evidence, reveal paths, and return without losing the surrounding pond.

title: Wiki Graf
description: Grow a sourced research pond one article at a time while preserving every explored ring and the exact route back.

title: PSR
description: Generate unrelated concept triplets; test, score, and archive how an AI connects them.

description: Inspect connected compartments, phase states, and hyphal flux in an interactive systems map.

title: Saperli Popette
description: A weird, unpredictable French conversation partner. Mon ami, bienvenue!
